fields.name: Activity Type
fields.tooltip: Specifies the type of activity that the warehouse performed on the line, such as put-away, pick, or movement.

fields.name: No.
fields.tooltip: Specifies the number of the involved entry or record, according to the specified number series.

fields.name: Line No.
fields.tooltip: Specifies the number of the registered warehouse activity line.

fields.name: Source Type
fields.tooltip: Specifies the type of transaction the source document is associated with, such as sales, purchase, and production.

fields.name: Source Subtype
fields.tooltip: Specifies the source subtype of the document related to the registered activity line.

fields.name: Source No.
fields.tooltip: Specifies the number of the source document that the entry originates from.

fields.name: Source Line No.
fields.tooltip: Specifies the line number of the source document that the entry originates from.

fields.name: Source Subline No.
fields.tooltip: Specifies the number of the source document subline related to this activity line.

fields.name: Source Document
fields.tooltip: Specifies the type of document that the line relates to.

fields.name: Location Code
fields.tooltip: Specifies the code for the location at which the activity occurs.

fields.name: Shelf No.
fields.tooltip: Specifies the shelf number of the item on the line for information use.

fields.name: Item No.
fields.tooltip: Specifies the item number of the item to be handled, such as picked or put away.

fields.name: Variant Code
fields.tooltip: Specifies the variant of the item on the line.

fields.name: Unit of Measure Code
fields.tooltip: Specifies how each unit of the item or resource is measured, such as in pieces or hours. By default, the value in the Base Unit of Measure field on the item or resource card is inserted.

fields.name: Qty. per Unit of Measure
fields.tooltip: Specifies the quantity per unit of measure of the item on the line.

fields.name: Description
fields.tooltip: Specifies a description of the item on the line.

fields.name: Description 2
fields.tooltip: Specifies a description of the item on the line.

fields.name: Quantity
fields.tooltip: Specifies the quantity of the item that was put-away, picked or moved.

fields.name: Qty. (Base)
fields.tooltip: Specifies the quantity of the item that was put-away, picked or moved.

fields.name: Shipping Advice
fields.tooltip: Specifies the shipping advice about whether a partial delivery was acceptable to the order recipient.

fields.name: Due Date
fields.tooltip: Specifies the date when the warehouse activity must be completed.

fields.name: Serial No.
fields.tooltip: Specifies the serial number that was handled.

fields.name: Lot No.
fields.tooltip: Specifies the lot number that was handled.

fields.name: Expiration Date
fields.tooltip: Specifies the expiration date of the serial number that was handled.

fields.name: Bin Code
fields.tooltip: Specifies the bin where the items are picked or put away.

fields.name: Zone Code
fields.tooltip: Specifies the code of the zone in which the bin on this line is located.

fields.name: Action Type
fields.tooltip: Specifies the action you must perform for the items on the line.

fields.name: Whse. Document Type
fields.tooltip: Specifies the type of document that the line originated from.

fields.name: Whse. Document No.
fields.tooltip: Specifies the number of the warehouse document that is the basis for the action on the line.

fields.name: Whse. Document Line No.
fields.tooltip: Specifies the number of the line in the warehouse document that is the basis for the action on the line.

fields.name: Cubage
fields.tooltip: Specifies the total cubage of items on the line, calculated based on the Quantity field.

fields.name: Weight
fields.tooltip: Specifies the weight of one item unit when measured in the specified unit of measure.

fields.name: Special Equipment Code
fields.tooltip: Specifies the code of the equipment required when you perform the action on the line.
